description_long: This is a sleek, modern electric sedan with a streamlined, aerodynamic body finished in glossy white. The car features a full-length black glass roof, giving it a premium and futuristic appearance. The windows are tinted, and the door handles are flush with the body, contributing to its smooth profile. The wheels are large, multi-spoke alloys with a sporty design, and the tires are low-profile, enhancing the car's performance look. At the rear, the car has a subtle integrated spoiler and slim, horizontal taillights, while the front is characterized by a minimalist grille and sharp, angular headlights. The overall design is distinctly contemporary, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, typical of high-end electric vehicles.
description: A glossy white, modern electric sedan with a black glass roof, flush door handles, and sporty alloy wheels. Its design is sleek and minimalist, with tinted windows and slim lights.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the integrated spoiler, slim taillights, and the brand emblem on the trunk.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the flush door handles, tinted windows, and the full-length black glass roof.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the minimalist grille, sharp headlights, and the smooth, aerodynamic hood.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the alloy wheels, flush handles, and the continuous glass roof.
attribute_badging_or_emblem: Tesla T logo on rear trunk
